examples: Life time is precious, I would like to run out of it on the way with you, expecting there will be sunshine in your heart, mirthlessly and happily like the brave flower.
Mr.Song laughed mirthlessly afterward, saying the man in the Hyundai was a boyhood friend of his youngest son and hated outsiders but probably would not hurt a family friend.
In an interview broadcast last Wednesday, Clinton nods her head patiently throughout, as if to humor Dan Rather, and laughs loudly and mirthlessly when he asks about her mysterious marriage.
